name: Improper Neutralization of Null Byte or NUL Character
description: The product does not properly handle null bytes (\0, %00) in user input, which can truncate strings in C-based systems, bypass validation that only checks up to the null byte, or cause interpretation mismatches between components that handle null bytes differently.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing null bytes that bypasses CONTROL[input_validation] (which may stop reading at the null) while the downstream STORAGE[file_access] or EXTERNAL[interpreter] processes the full data including content after the null, creating a validation-vs-use mismatch
